reason_selected: Sprint closeout requires fresh git/test evidence. RAM cache was faster (298ms) but cannot guarantee freshness for closeout evidence requirements.

alternatives_rejected.reason: RAM cache (298ms) is faster but may contain stale git/test state for closeout
SSD cache has even lower freshness guarantees than RAM cache

receipt_summary.label: Canonical evidence selected; performance sacrificed for evidence quality
receipt_summary.detail: Slower canonical evidence read selected over faster RAM cache to ensure sprint closeout evidence integrity.
